## TRM1.4. Vertical flight efficiency of the descent (PI#7)

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (149.2 seconds per flight), average times flown level during descent are on average 118 seconds per flight lower in Norway. The highest average time flown level during descent happens at Oslo (ENGM) (36.5 seconds per flight), while the lowest happens at Trondheim/Værnes (ENVA) (22.6 seconds per flight).
